title: Google treats deep research as a mainstream AI report workflow
claim: Google's Gemini updates position Deep Research as a feature that creates comprehensive, easy-to-read reports across broad topics and brings that behavior to mainstream app surfaces.
source_snippet: Deep Research can generate comprehensive, easy-to-read reports on research topics.
implication: ProductOS should assume that polished report generation is being commoditized and compete on PM-native structure, validation, and workflow continuity.
followup_questions: Which PM outcomes still need more than a general-purpose deep research report?
